name: <OnSomeIpFieldNotification>
title: <OnSomeIpFieldNotification>
description: This callback function is called by SOME/IP IL when a notification message has been received for the field specified in the pfHandle parameter.
A callback function with this signature must be passed to the CAPL function SomeIpCreateFieldConsumer.

parameters.name: cfHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the field that triggered the callback.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Message handle of the SOME/IP field notification.

description: In this example, it is assumed that the utilized field is contained in the FIBEX database that is assigned to the CANoe configuration. The field has the Notification ID 30, the Getter ID 31, and the Setter ID 32. The data type of the field is a standard data type (for example, UINT8).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
